name: Capellini with Shrimp and Herb Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot of boiling, salted water, cook the Capellini until just barely tender; drain, rinse, and place in a large bowl.
2. Toss the Capellini with a little olive oil to keep it from sticking together.
3. In a large skillet, heat 3 tablespoons Olive oil and 3 tablespoons Butter over medium heat. Add shrimp and garlic, sautéing until the shrimp just turns pink.
4. Stir in lemon juice, fresh parsley, oregano, dill weed, and chicken broth; reduce heat and simmer until heated through.
5. Pour the shrimp mixture over the Capellini and toss gently until the pasta is lightly coated. Season with pepper and serve immediately.
